title: Qwen登陆Eden AI，35%折扣庆祝上线
full_text:
Alibaba Cloud on X: "Big news! 🚀 Qwen is now live on #Eden AI, one of Europe’s leading AI gateways, trusted by more than 200,000 developers.
Enterprises can now access Qwen’s powerful open-weight models for reasoning, coding, and AI applications through Eden AI’s unified API, making it easier to https://t.co/W2zijxNPIr" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Alibaba Cloud
@alibaba_cloud
Big news! 🚀 Qwen is now live on #Eden AI, one of Europe’s leading AI gateways, trusted by more than 200,000 developers.
Enterprises can now access Qwen’s powerful open-weight models for reasoning, coding, and AI applications through Eden AI’s unified API, making it easier to lows while avoiding vendor lock-in.
To celebrate the launch, enjoy 35% OFF all Qwen models.
If you are attending VivaTech Alibaba Cloud AInnovation Summit at Hall 7.3 Workshop A next week, stay tuned for a special meet-up with Eden AI CEO Taha Zemmouri and Eden AI CPTO Samy Melaine.
🔗 Start building today: app.edenai.run/playground
#AlibabaCloud #Qwen #EdenAI #VivaTech2026 #GenerativeAI #Developers #CloudComputing
9:30 AM · Jun 11, 2026 938 Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: Qwen登陆Eden AI，35%折扣庆祝上线
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 阿里云宣布Qwen模型上线欧洲AI网关Eden AI。Eden AI拥有超20万开发者，企业可通过其统一API访问Qwen开放权重模型（用于推理、编程和AI应用），构建多模型工作流并避免供应商锁定。庆祝上线期间，所有Qwen模型享35%折扣。下周VivaTech阿里云AI创新峰会（7.3区Workshop A）将举办特别见面会，Eden AI CEO与CPTO出席。

key_excerpts.text: 阿里云宣布Qwen模型上线欧洲AI网关Eden AI。Eden AI拥有超20万开发者，企业可通过其统一API访问Qwen开放权重模型（用于推理、编程和AI应用），构建多模型工作流并避免供应商锁定。庆祝上线期间，所有Qwen模型享35%折扣。下周VivaTech阿里云AI创新峰会（7.3区Workshop A）将举办特别见面会，Eden AI CEO与CPTO出席。
